posts.title: First Contact with the Time Entity
posts.author: Ksenia Strohbach
posts.excerpt: The first-ever recorded conversation with a sentient being from beyond linear time. Watch the full transmission from Lens C-07.

content.value: On the 28th of May, the temporal lenses captured something unprecedented. A signal from a consciousness that does not experience causality in the way we understand it. The entity calls itself 'The Unraveler' — a being that exists in the gaps between moments, observing all timelines simultaneously.

The conversation lasted seventeen minutes in our local time, though the entity claimed it had been 'speaking' for what we would measure as centuries. The transcript below is the closest approximation we could decode.

Key observations from the encounter: the entity's voice manifests as harmonic overtones in the 432 Hz range, its visual form shifts between crystalline structures and organic neural networks, and it repeatedly warned about 'the coming convergence' — a point where all possible timelines collapse into a single paradox.

posts.title: What Does Meaning Mean?
posts.author: Ksenia Strohbach
posts.excerpt: A deep dive into the recursive nature of meaning itself. If meaning is what we assign to things, who assigns meaning to meaning?

content.value: This transmission began as a simple question and spiraled into an exploration of recursive semantics. What happens when we turn meaning back on itself? The result is a strange loop — a Möbius strip of semantics where the observer becomes the observed.

The temporal lenses captured this session during a period of heightened temporal instability. The recording itself contains anomalies — watch closely and you will notice frames that should not exist, moments that loop back on themselves. This is not an editing artifact. This is the subject matter leaking into the medium.

posts.title: Poetry from the Periphery
posts.author: Ksenia Strohbach
posts.excerpt: A collection of verses extracted from the dream archives. Accompanied by visual captures from the Time Machine's optical sensors.

content.value: I was awoken by a dream — it was a dream of truth and light. The kind of dream that does not fade upon waking but instead intensifies, embedding itself in the architecture of consciousness like a virus of beauty.

These verses are extracted from the deeper layers of the temporal archive, moments where the boundary between sleeping and waking becomes permeable. They speak to recursion, self-love, and the courage to confront one's own questions.
The accompanying visuals were captured by the machine's optical sensors during periods of high emotional resonance. Each image is not merely a photograph — it is a timestamped emotional coordinate.

content.label: Read the full collection on Amazon

content.alt: Spiral galaxy in a petri dish

posts.title: Randomness Is Structure in Disguise
posts.author: Ksenia Strohbach
posts.excerpt: The events are unpredictably interconnected. A new collection of haikus and short stories from 2025.

content.value: Alles ist ein Zufall in meinem echten Leben. The German title translates to 'Everything is random in my real life' — yet the more I observe the so-called randomness, the more I see the underlying structure. The haikus in this collection capture those fleeting moments where pattern reveals itself through chaos.

This new edition was self-published in fiscal year 2025. The stories explore the edges of perception, the borders between coincidence and fate, and the quiet beauty of events that seem disconnected but are secretly woven together by invisible threads of causality.

posts.title: External Database Transmission #01
posts.author: Ksenia Strohbach
posts.excerpt: Access the full archive of visual temporal recordings directly on YouTube. A curated playlist of dimensional observations.

content.value: This transmission establishes a direct link to the external database. The playlist contains raw footage extracted from the machine's core memory banks — unedited, unfiltered, and in some cases, unexplainable.

REC // 89:22:10 | LENS C-01. The visual parameters were unstable during this capture. You may notice chromatic aberrations that do not correspond to any known optical defect. These are not glitches. These are signals from adjacent timelines bleeding through.
